why_this_genome: never appeared in train or calibration for ANY drug -- verified against the
its SNP cluster (PDS_acc) is absent from every training split, so this is a
genuinely unseen lineage, not just an unseen sample
mixed antibiogram (1 resistant / 3 susceptible), so a model that calls
everything resistant is visibly wrong on it
note: ceftriaxone was not tested for this isolate; the model still predicts it.
